from collections.abc import Generator
from typing import Any

import orjson
from fastapi.encoders import jsonable_encoder

from langflow.base.io.chat import ChatComponent
from langflow.helpers.data import safe_convert
from langflow.inputs.inputs import BoolInput, DropdownInput, HandleInput, MessageTextInput
from langflow.schema.data import Data
from langflow.schema.dataframe import DataFrame
from langflow.schema.message import Message
from langflow.schema.properties import Source
from langflow.template.field.base import Output
from langflow.utils.constants import (
    MESSAGE_SENDER_AI,
    MESSAGE_SENDER_NAME_AI,
    MESSAGE_SENDER_USER,
)


class ChatOutput(ChatComponent):
    display_name = "Chat Output"
    description = "Display a chat message in the Playground."
    documentation: str = "https://docs.langflow.org/components-io#chat-output"
    icon = "MessagesSquare"
    name = "ChatOutput"
    minimized = True

    inputs = [
        HandleInput(
            name="input_value",
            display_name="Inputs",
            info="Message to be passed as output.",
            input_types=["Data", "DataFrame", "Message"],
            required=True,
        ),
        BoolInput(
            name="should_store_message",
            display_name="Store Messages",
            info="Store the message in the history.",
            value=True,
            advanced=True,
        ),
        DropdownInput(
            name="sender",
            display_name="Sender Type",
            options=[MESSAGE_SENDER_AI, MESSAGE_SENDER_USER],
            value=MESSAGE_SENDER_AI,
            advanced=True,
            info="Type of sender.",
        ),
        MessageTextInput(
            name="sender_name",
            display_name="Sender Name",
            info="Name of the sender.",
            value=MESSAGE_SENDER_NAME_AI,
            advanced=True,
        ),
        MessageTextInput(
            name="session_id",
            display_name="Session ID",
            info="The session ID of the chat. If empty, the current session ID parameter will be used.",
            advanced=True,
        ),
        MessageTextInput(
            name="data_template",
            display_name="Data Template",
            value="{text}",
            advanced=True,
            info="Template to convert Data to Text. If left empty, it will be dynamically set to the Data's text key.",
        ),
        MessageTextInput(
            name="background_color",
            display_name="Background Color",
            info="The background color of the icon.",
            advanced=True,
        ),
        MessageTextInput(
            name="chat_icon",
            display_name="Icon",
            info="The icon of the message.",
            advanced=True,
        ),
        MessageTextInput(
            name="text_color",
            display_name="Text Color",
            info="The text color of the name",
            advanced=True,
        ),
        BoolInput(
            name="clean_data",
            display_name="Basic Clean Data",
            value=True,
            info="Whether to clean the data",
            advanced=True,
        ),
    ]
    outputs = [
        Output(
            display_name="Output Message",
            name="message",
            method="message_response",
        ),
    ]

    def _build_source(self, id_: str | None, display_name: str | None, source: str | None) -> Source:
        source_dict = {}
        if id_:
            source_dict["id"] = id_
        if display_name:
            source_dict["display_name"] = display_name
        if source:
            # Handle case where source is a ChatOpenAI object
            if hasattr(source, "model_name"):
                source_dict["source"] = source.model_name
            elif hasattr(source, "model"):
                source_dict["source"] = str(source.model)
            else:
                source_dict["source"] = str(source)
        return Source(**source_dict)

    async def message_response(self) -> Message:
        # First convert the input to string if needed
        text = self.convert_to_string()

        # Get source properties
        source, icon, display_name, source_id = self.get_properties_from_source_component()
        background_color = self.background_color
        text_color = self.text_color
        if self.chat_icon:
            icon = self.chat_icon

        # Create or use existing Message object
        if isinstance(self.input_value, Message):
            message = self.input_value
            # Update message properties
            message.text = text
        else:
            message = Message(text=text)

        # Set message properties
        message.sender = self.sender
        message.sender_name = self.sender_name
        message.session_id = self.session_id
        message.flow_id = self.graph.flow_id if hasattr(self, "graph") else None
        message.properties.source = self._build_source(source_id, display_name, source)
        message.properties.icon = icon
        message.properties.background_color = background_color
        message.properties.text_color = text_color

        # Store message if needed
        if self.session_id and self.should_store_message:
            stored_message = await self.send_message(message)
            self.message.value = stored_message
            message = stored_message

        self.status = message
        return message

    def _serialize_data(self, data: Data) -> str:
        """Serialize Data object to JSON string."""
        # Convert data.data to JSON-serializable format
        serializable_data = jsonable_encoder(data.data)
        # Serialize with orjson, enabling pretty printing with indentation
        json_bytes = orjson.dumps(serializable_data, option=orjson.OPT_INDENT_2)
        # Convert bytes to string and wrap in Markdown code blocks
        return "```json\n" + json_bytes.decode("utf-8") + "\n```"

    def _validate_input(self) -> None:
        """Validate the input data and raise ValueError if invalid."""
        if self.input_value is None:
            msg = "Input data cannot be None"
            raise ValueError(msg)
        if isinstance(self.input_value, list) and not all(
            isinstance(item, Message | Data | DataFrame | str) for item in self.input_value
        ):
            invalid_types = [
                type(item).__name__
                for item in self.input_value
                if not isinstance(item, Message | Data | DataFrame | str)
            ]
            msg = f"Expected Data or DataFrame or Message or str, got {invalid_types}"
            raise TypeError(msg)
        if not isinstance(
            self.input_value,
            Message | Data | DataFrame | str | list | Generator | type(None),
        ):
            type_name = type(self.input_value).__name__
            msg = f"Expected Data or DataFrame or Message or str, Generator or None, got {type_name}"
            raise TypeError(msg)

    def convert_to_string(self) -> str | Generator[Any, None, None]:
        """Convert input data to string with proper error handling."""
        self._validate_input()
        if isinstance(self.input_value, list):
            return "\n".join([safe_convert(item, clean_data=self.clean_data) for item in self.input_value])
        if isinstance(self.input_value, Generator):
            return self.input_value
        return safe_convert(self.input_value)

data_template.info: Template to convert Data to Text. If left empty, it will be dynamically set to the Data's text key.
data_template.name: data_template

input_value.info: Message to be passed as output.
input_value.name: input_value

session_id.info: The session ID of the chat. If empty, the current session ID parameter will be used.
session_id.name: session_id

should_store_message.info: Store the message in the history.
should_store_message.name: should_store_message

text_color.info: The text color of the name
text_color.name: text_color

code.value:
from typing import Any, Optional

from langchain_core.tools import StructuredTool
from langflow.base.agents.agent import LCToolsAgentComponent
from langflow.base.agents.events import ExceptionWithMessageError
from langflow.base.constants import STREAM_INFO_TEXT
from langflow.base.models.model_input_constants import get_filtered_inputs
from langflow.base.models.model_utils import get_model_name
from langflow.components.helpers import CurrentDateComponent
from langflow.components.helpers.memory import MemoryComponent
from langflow.components.langchain_utilities.tool_calling import ToolCallingAgentComponent
from langflow.inputs import SecretStrInput
from langflow.io import BoolInput, MultilineInput, Output
from langflow.logging import logger
from langflow.schema.dotdict import dotdict
from langflow.schema.message import Message

from langflow_patch.backend.components.gigachat.model import GigaChatModelComponent
from langflow_patch.backend.patchs.patch_inputs_and_io import CertificateInput


def set_advanced_true(component_input):
    component_input.advanced = True
    return component_input


class GigaChatAgentComponent(ToolCallingAgentComponent):
    display_name: str = "GigaChat Agent"
    description: str = "Define the agent's instructions, then enter a task to complete using tools."
    icon = "GigaChatViolet"
    beta = False
    name = "GigaChatAgent"

    memory_inputs = [set_advanced_true(component_input) for component_input in MemoryComponent().inputs]
    gigachat_inputs = get_filtered_inputs(GigaChatModelComponent)

    inputs = [
        *gigachat_inputs,
        SecretStrInput(
            name="auth_url",
            display_name="GigaChat Auth URL",
            advanced=True,
            info="Базовый API GigaChatПо умолчанию https://gigachat.devices.sberbank.ru/api/v1.",
            # value="GIGACHAT_AUTH_URL",
        ),
        SecretStrInput(
            name="base_url",
            display_name="GigaChat Base URL",
            advanced=True,
            info="Базовый API GigaChatПо умолчанию https://gigachat.devices.sberbank.ru/api/v1.",
            value="GIGACHAT_BASE_URL",
        ),
        BoolInput(
            name="use_certificate",
            display_name="Use Certificate",
            value=False,
            info="Использовать ли клиенскую проверку серверного сертификата",
            real_time_refresh=True,
            advanced=True,
        ),
        CertificateInput(
            name="certificates",
            display_name="Certificates",
            info="SSL/TLS certificates configurations",
            show=False,
        ),
        MultilineInput(
            name="system_prompt",
            display_name="Agent Instructions",
            info="System Prompt: Initial instructions and context provided to guide the agent's behavior.",
            value="You are a helpful assistant that can use tools to answer questions and perform tasks.",
            advanced=False,
        ),
        *LCToolsAgentComponent._base_inputs,
        *memory_inputs,
        BoolInput(
            name="add_current_date_tool",
            display_name="Current Date",
            advanced=True,
            info="If true, will add a tool to the agent that returns the current date.",
            value=True,
        ),
        BoolInput(
            name="stream",
            display_name="Streaming",
            info=STREAM_INFO_TEXT,
            advanced=True,
            value=False,
        ),
        BoolInput(name="verbose", display_name="Verbose", value=False, advanced=True),
    ]
    outputs = [Output(name="response", display_name="Response", method="message_response")]

    def update_build_config(self, build_config: dotdict, field_value: Any, field_name: Optional[str] = None):
        if field_name == "use_certificate":
            build_config["certificates"]["show"] = field_value

        return build_config

    async def message_response(self) -> Message:
        try:
            # Get LLM model and validate
            llm_model, display_name = self.get_llm()
            if llm_model is None:
                msg = "No language model selected. Please choose a model to proceed."
                raise ValueError(msg)
            self.model_name = get_model_name(llm_model, display_name=display_name)

            # Get memory data
            self.chat_history = await self.get_memory_data()

            # Add current date tool if enabled
            if self.add_current_date_tool:
                if not isinstance(self.tools, list):  # type: ignore[has-type]
                    self.tools = []
                current_date_tool = (await CurrentDateComponent(**self.get_base_args()).to_toolkit()).pop(0)
                if not isinstance(current_date_tool, StructuredTool):
                    msg = "CurrentDateComponent must be converted to a StructuredTool"
                    raise TypeError(msg)
                self.tools.append(current_date_tool)

            # Validate tools
            if not self.tools:
                msg = "Tools are required to run the agent. Please add at least one tool."
                raise ValueError(msg)

            # Set up and run agent
            self.set(
                llm=llm_model,
                tools=self.tools,
                chat_history=self.chat_history,
                input_value=self.input_value,
                system_prompt=self.system_prompt,
            )
            self.system_prompt = str(self.system_prompt).replace("{", "{{").replace("}", "}}")
            agent = self.create_agent_runnable()
            return await self.run_agent(agent)

        except (ValueError, TypeError, KeyError) as e:
            logger.error(f"{type(e).__name__}: {e!s}")
            raise
        except ExceptionWithMessageError as e:
            logger.error(f"ExceptionWithMessageError occurred: {e}")
            raise
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Unexpected error: {e!s}")
            raise

    async def get_memory_data(self):
        memory_kwargs = {
            component_input.name: getattr(self, f"{component_input.name}") for component_input in self.memory_inputs
        }
        # filter out empty values
        memory_kwargs = {k: v for k, v in memory_kwargs.items() if v}

        memory_data = await MemoryComponent(**self.get_base_args()).set(**memory_kwargs).retrieve_messages()
        # exclude last message cause it equal to user input
        return memory_data[1:]  # type:ignore

    def get_llm(self):
        try:
            component_class = GigaChatModelComponent()
            display_name = component_class.display_name
            inputs = self.gigachat_inputs
            return self._build_llm_model(component_class, inputs), display_name
        except Exception as e:
            msg = "Error building GigaChat language model"
            raise ValueError(msg) from e

    def _build_llm_model(self, component, inputs, prefix=""):
        model_kwargs = {input_.name: getattr(self, f"{prefix}{input_.name}") for input_ in inputs}
        if self.use_certificate and self.certificates:
            model_kwargs["ca_bundle_file"] = self.certificates.get_file_ca_cert()
            model_kwargs["cert_file"] = self.certificates.get_file_cert()
            model_kwargs["key_file"] = self.certificates.get_file_key()

        llm_model = component.set(**model_kwargs, stream=self.stream).build_model()
        llm_model.disable_streaming = not (self.stream)
        return llm_model

from langflow.base.data.utils import IMG_FILE_TYPES, TEXT_FILE_TYPES
from langflow.base.io.chat import ChatComponent
from langflow.inputs.inputs import BoolInput
from langflow.io import (
    DropdownInput,
    FileInput,
    MessageTextInput,
    MultilineInput,
    Output,
)
from langflow.schema.message import Message
from langflow.utils.constants import (
    MESSAGE_SENDER_AI,
    MESSAGE_SENDER_NAME_USER,
    MESSAGE_SENDER_USER,
)


class ChatInput(ChatComponent):
    display_name = "Chat Input"
    description = "Get chat inputs from the Playground."
    documentation: str = "https://docs.langflow.org/components-io#chat-input"
    icon = "MessagesSquare"
    name = "ChatInput"
    minimized = True

    inputs = [
        MultilineInput(
            name="input_value",
            display_name="Input Text",
            value="",
            info="Message to be passed as input.",
        ),
        BoolInput(
            name="should_store_message",
            display_name="Store Messages",
            info="Store the message in the history.",
            value=True,
            advanced=True,
        ),
        DropdownInput(
            name="sender",
            display_name="Sender Type",
            options=[MESSAGE_SENDER_AI, MESSAGE_SENDER_USER],
            value=MESSAGE_SENDER_USER,
            info="Type of sender.",
            advanced=True,
        ),
        MessageTextInput(
            name="sender_name",
            display_name="Sender Name",
            info="Name of the sender.",
            value=MESSAGE_SENDER_NAME_USER,
            advanced=True,
        ),
        MessageTextInput(
            name="session_id",
            display_name="Session ID",
            info="The session ID of the chat. If empty, the current session ID parameter will be used.",
            advanced=True,
        ),
        FileInput(
            name="files",
            display_name="Files",
            file_types=TEXT_FILE_TYPES + IMG_FILE_TYPES,
            info="Files to be sent with the message.",
            advanced=True,
            is_list=True,
            temp_file=True,
        ),
        MessageTextInput(
            name="background_color",
            display_name="Background Color",
            info="The background color of the icon.",
            advanced=True,
        ),
        MessageTextInput(
            name="chat_icon",
            display_name="Icon",
            info="The icon of the message.",
            advanced=True,
        ),
        MessageTextInput(
            name="text_color",
            display_name="Text Color",
            info="The text color of the name",
            advanced=True,
        ),
    ]
    outputs = [
        Output(display_name="Chat Message", name="message", method="message_response"),
    ]

    async def message_response(self) -> Message:
        background_color = self.background_color
        text_color = self.text_color
        icon = self.chat_icon

        message = await Message.create(
            text=self.input_value,
            sender=self.sender,
            sender_name=self.sender_name,
            session_id=self.session_id,
            files=self.files,
            properties={
                "background_color": background_color,
                "text_color": text_color,
                "icon": icon,
            },
        )
        if self.session_id and isinstance(message, Message) and self.should_store_message:
            stored_message = await self.send_message(
                message,
            )
            self.message.value = stored_message
            message = stored_message

        self.status = message
        return message

files.info: Files to be sent with the message.
files.name: files

input_value.info: Message to be passed as input.
input_value.name: input_value

"""SearchPlugin-based web search component for LangFlow."""

from __future__ import annotations

import logging
import os
import uuid
from typing import Iterable, List, Optional, Sequence

import httpx
from langflow.custom import Component
from langflow.io import BoolInput, IntInput, MessageTextInput, Output, SecretStrInput
from langflow.schema import Data

from agent_lab_sdk.metrics import get_metric

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)

SEARCH_PLUGIN_DEFAULT_URL = os.getenv("SEARCH_PLUGIN_URL", "https://gigachat.dev.app.sberdevices.ru/retrieval")
DEFAULT_MAX_RESULTS = int(os.getenv("SEARCH_PLUGIN_DEFAULT_MAX_RESULTS", 6))
CLIENT_TIMEOUT_SECONDS = int(os.getenv("SEARCH_PLUGIN_TIMEOUT_SECONDS", 30))

search_plugin_error_metric = get_metric(
    "gauge",
    "search_plugin_errors_total",
    "Количество ошибок Search Plugin (200 + error в response payload)",
)
search_plugin_empty_payload_metric = get_metric(
    "gauge",
    "search_plugin_empty_payload_total",
    "Количество пустых ответов Search Plugin",
)


def _require_api_key(explicit_key: Optional[str] = None) -> str:
    candidate = explicit_key
    if candidate:
        env_candidate = os.getenv(candidate)
        if env_candidate:
            candidate = env_candidate
    api_key = candidate or os.getenv("SEARCH_PLUGIN_KEY")
    if not api_key:
        raise RuntimeError(
            "SEARCH_PLUGIN_KEY не найден. Укажи ключ Search Plugin в переменной окружения или поле компонента."
        )
    return api_key


def _build_query(query: str, domains: Optional[Iterable[str]]) -> str:
    query = (query or "").strip()
    if not query:
        return ""
    if domains:
        sanitized = [domain.strip() for domain in domains if domain and domain.strip()]
        if sanitized:
            query += " site:" + " OR site:".join(sanitized)
    return query


def _format_documents(documents: List[dict], sources: dict) -> str:
    if not documents:
        return "Search Plugin не нашёл результатов по запросу."

    lines: List[str] = []
    for index, doc in enumerate(documents, 1):
        ref = str(doc.get("reference_keyword"))
        source = sources.get(ref, {}) if sources else {}
        title = source.get("title") or "Без заголовка"
        url = source.get("url") or ""
        snippet = (doc.get("text") or "")[:5000]
        block = f"{index}. {title}\n{url}\n{snippet}".strip()
        lines.append(block)
    return "\n\n".join(lines)


def _parse_domains(raw_value: str | List[str] | None) -> Optional[List[str]]:
    if not raw_value:
        return None
    if isinstance(raw_value, list):
        candidates = raw_value
    else:
        normalized = raw_value.replace("\n", ",")
        candidates = [chunk.strip() for chunk in normalized.split(",")]
    domains = [candidate for candidate in candidates if candidate]
    return domains or None


def _normalize_domains(domains: Optional[str | Iterable[str]]) -> Optional[List[str]]:
    if not domains:
        return None
    if isinstance(domains, str):
        return _parse_domains(domains)
    sanitized = [str(domain).strip() for domain in domains if domain and str(domain).strip()]
    return sanitized or None


class SearchPluginComponent(Component):
    """
    Компонент для выполнения веб-поиска с использованием Search Plugin.
    """
    display_name = "Search Plugin"
    description = "Выполняет веб-поиск через Search Plugin и возвращает краткие выдержки со ссылками."
    icon = "Search"
    name = "SearchPlugin"

    inputs = [
        MessageTextInput(
            name="query",
            display_name="Запрос",
            info="Поисковый запрос",
            required=True,
            tool_mode=True,
        ),
        IntInput(
            name="max_results",
            display_name="Максимум результатов",
            info="Количество документов в ответе",
            value=DEFAULT_MAX_RESULTS,
            advanced=True,
        ),
        BoolInput(
            name="safe_search",
            display_name="Safe Search",
            info="Использовать режим safe_search вместо actual_info_web_search",
            value=False,
            advanced=True,
        ),
        MessageTextInput(
            name="domains",
            display_name="Домены",
            info="Список доменов через запятую или перенос строки, чтобы ограничить поиск",
            required=False,
            advanced=True,
        ),
        SecretStrInput(
            name="url",
            display_name="Search Plugin URL",
            info="Endpoint Search Plugin, по умолчанию https://${SEARCH_PLUGIN_HOST}/retrieval",
            value="SEARCH_PLUGIN_URL",
            advanced=True,
        ),
        SecretStrInput(
            name="api_key",
            display_name="Search Plugin API Key",
            info="API ключ Search Plugin",
            value="SEARCH_PLUGIN_KEY",
            required=False,
            advanced=True,
        ),
        IntInput(
            name="timeout",
            display_name="Timeout",
            info="Таймаут запроса в секундах",
            value=CLIENT_TIMEOUT_SECONDS,
            advanced=True,
        ),
    ]

    outputs = [
        Output(display_name="Search Result", name="search_result", type_=Data, method="run_search")
    ]

    def run_search(self) -> Data:
        response_text = self._perform_search(
            query=(self.query or "").strip(),
            max_results=max(1, int(self.max_results or DEFAULT_MAX_RESULTS)),
            safe_search=bool(self.safe_search),
            domains=_parse_domains(self.domains),
        )
        self.status = response_text
        return Data(data={"text": response_text})

    def build(self):
        return self.run_search

    def _perform_search(
        self,
        query: str,
        max_results: int,
        safe_search: bool,
        domains: Optional[Sequence[str] | str] = None,
    ) -> str:
        domain_list = _normalize_domains(domains)
        search_query = _build_query(query, domain_list)
        if not search_query:
            return "Формулировка запроса пуста. Уточни, что именно искать."

        try:
            api_key = _require_api_key(self.api_key)
        except RuntimeError as error:
            logger.warning("Search Plugin key missing: %s", error)
            return str(error)

        search_mode = "safe_search" if safe_search else "actual_info_web_search"
        body = {
            "query": search_query,
            "search_mode": search_mode,
            "additional_data": {"doc_count": max(1, max_results)},
        }

        headers = {
            "Authorization": api_key,
            "X-User-ID": str(uuid.uuid4()),
            "X-Client-ID": str(uuid.uuid4()),
            "X-Request-ID": str(uuid.uuid4()),
            "X-Session-ID": str(uuid.uuid4()),
            "User-Agent": "agent-toolkit",
        }

        url = self.url or SEARCH_PLUGIN_DEFAULT_URL
        timeout = self.timeout or CLIENT_TIMEOUT_SECONDS
        logger.info("Search Plugin request to %s with query='%s'", url, search_query)

        try:
            with httpx.Client(timeout=timeout) as client:
                response = client.post(url, headers=headers, json=body)
                response.raise_for_status()
                payload = response.json()
                if payload.get("payload", {}).get("status") == "error":
                    search_plugin_error_metric.inc()
                    raise ValueError(str(payload))

                documents = payload.get("payload", {}).get("documents", [])
                sources = payload.get("sources", {})
                limited_documents = documents[: max(1, max_results)]
                if not limited_documents:
                    search_plugin_empty_payload_metric.inc()
                result_text = _format_documents(limited_documents, sources)
                self.status = result_text
                return result_text
        except Exception as error:  # noqa: BLE001
            logger.exception("Search Plugin request failed")
            search_plugin_empty_payload_metric.inc()
            return f"Search Plugin вернул ошибку или пустой ответ: {error}"

input_value.name: input_value
input_value.value: Ты помогаешь собирать условия потребительских кредитов российских банков. Всегда используй инструмент поиска. Если данных недостаточно, сделай еще 1-2 уточняющих поисковых запроса по комбинациям: ставка, ПСК, тариф, калькулятор, условия и названию банка. В ответе явно помечай, какие данные найдены точно, а какие не найдены.
